name: Krumkake # 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar until light and lemon-colored.
2. Add vanilla and carefully stir flour into the egg mixture.
3. Add butter and water, then blend everything together.
4. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
5. Heat the krumkake iron.
6. Grease lightly for the first cookie only.
7. Pour a small amount of batter (about a tablespoon) into the iron.
8. Bake until golden brown.
9. Immediately form into cones around a wooden cone shape or drape over cups to form cookie bowls.
10. Cool on a rack.
11. Makes about 35 to 40 cookies.
12. Serve alone or with fruit and whipped cream or ice cream.
